'''Doimo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] who became famous for their role as a military [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. Due to their fame as an [[Officer/Legends|officer]], there were female members of Doimo's [[Species/Legends|species]] named after them.<ref name="GCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Doimo was mentioned in the ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', a [[2003]] sourcebook for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and [[J.D. Wiker]].<ref name="GCG" />
